name: law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing records cause delayed payments. We provide automated extraction and formatting instead of manual entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate and poorly formatted legal billing records
